title: taraxacum galeifiguratum
intro: Taraxacum galeifolium is also known as the lesser hawk's beard or lesser dandelion and is a perennial plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and it is also used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Taraxacum galeifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum galeifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
